name: VIOLET ACADEMY
_layout: 10x8 enterable Academy core (docs/violet-city-design.md) — the ancient stone hall: the living answer to the Concord's 'skip the decade'. Ancient pillars (P, solid), an instructor + a student, and a wall inscription (the teaching). Door (d) south back to Violet's square. STUB this pass — the full grounds (training yard, bell room) is a Phase-7 follow-up.

objects._note: The teaching inscription on the back wall — the bond thesis as the Academy's whole purpose.
lines: Carved deep into the old stone:
We do not sell strength here.
We teach you to be worth
It takes years. That is not
the flaw. That is the point."
